title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: Find answers to frequently asked questions about Slovor Marketplace. Learn how to buy, sell, manage your account and stay safe on Slovakia's premium bazár.
a1: Yes, posting basic ads on Slovor is free for individuals.
q2: How do I contact a seller?
a2: You can use the contact details provided in the listing or our messaging system.
a3: We prioritize security and use industry-standard encryption to protect your data.
